raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fafauze Samuels
tohs Laudis preekich ta KUNga
uhs Mizpu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥsch fazzija us Isra-
cka Behrneem : Ta fatka tas
KUNGS/ tas Israēta Deews.
Es esmu Israēlu no Egiptes is-
weddīs/ un efmu juhs no to E-
gipteru Rohkas tsglabbis/ un no
tahs Rohkas wiffu Walstibu/
kas juhs spaidija :
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet juhs eﬀat schodeen
juhsu Deewu atmettuschi / kas
juhs no wiﬀahnjuhsu Behdahm
un Isbailehm irr atpestijs/un ef-
fat us to fazzijfchi: Eezell we-
nu Kehnizu pahr mums. Nu
tad/ stahjeetees preekfch ta KUN-
GA pehz juhsahn Ziltim / un
dinaja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad nu Samuels wiffas
Israēta Ziltis kizzis klahtu nahkt/
tad tappe ta Benjamina Zilts
eefihmota.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad wiꞥsch to Benja-
mixa Zilti likke klaht nahkt / tad
tappe Matra Rads eesihmohts/
un Sauls Kiſa Dehls tappe ee-
fhmohts. Un tee mekleja to / bet
wiꞥsch ne tappe atrasts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad waizaja tee to KUN-
GU : Arrig tas Wihrs wehl
nahks? tad fazzija tas KUNgs:
Raugi / wiꞥsch irr starp teem
Rihkeem apflehpees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad tee notezzeja/ un neh-
me winnu / un wiꞥsch stahjahs
to Lauschu Widdū/ un wiꞥsch
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Samuels u
wiﬀeem Laudim: Ar juhs redsa
curren tas KUNGS irr isredsej
jo ne kas irr tahds / ka wiﬀ-
starp wiﬀeem Laudim. Tad g-
wileja wiﬀi Laudis/ un fazzija
Lai dshwo tas Kehniisch.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadrunnaja Samuels u
teem Laudim to Walstitbas Te-
fu/ un rakstija to weenâ Gra-
matā/ un nolikfe to preekfch
KUNGA. Un Samuels atlaid
wiffus Laudis / ikkatru fam-
Namunā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Sauls gahje arridsa
Mahjās uhs Gibeju/ un ar wi-
nu gahje no ta Karra-Spehka-
kurreem Deews to Sirdi kul-
dinaja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tee netifli Laudis fa-
zija : Ka warretu schis muhs i-
glahbt / un nizzinaja to / un n-
neste winnaun Dahwanas ; b-
wiꞥsch likkahs to ne dsirdejs.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
